ledger.title: Trump Election: Deregulation & Defense Surge
actions: BUY iShares US Aerospace & Defense ETF (ITA)
BUY SPDR Financial Select Sector ETF (XLF)
ledger.notes: ITA returned +11.8%, XLF returned +16.4% in 9 days post-election. Exited both on schedule at price target. Clean WIN.

ledger.title: Japan BOJ Rate Hike — Yen Carry Trade Unwind
ledger.notes: Yen carry trade unwound sharply. IAU returned +6.1% on global risk-off. Covered the EWJ short at +10.5% as BOJ signaled pause. Avg return +8.3%.

ledger.title: Iran Direct Strike on Israel — First Ever
actions: BUY iShares US Aerospace & Defense ETF (ITA)
ledger.notes: Iran's strike was largely intercepted — de-escalation was faster than expected. GLD +3.2%, XLE +6.4%, ITA +4.8%. Below base case but all positive.

ledger.title: US Debt Ceiling X-Date Countdown 2023
actions: BUY iShares Short Treasury Bond ETF (SHV)
ledger.notes: Last-minute deal reached June 1. GLD returned +5.3% during the standoff. SHV held stable. Exited on schedule before deal announcement.

ledger.title: Silicon Valley Bank Collapse
actions: SHORT SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (KRE)
ledger.notes: KRE short returned +18.7% in 7 days. GLD added +4.2%. One of the cleanest event-driven trades in the backtest. Textbook risk-off execution.

ledger.title: OPEC+ 2M Barrel/Day Production Cut
ledger.notes: XLE returned +11.4% over 10 days. USO returned +9.8%. Exited as crude hit short-term resistance at $93/barrel. Clean WIN within predicted range.

ledger.title: Russia Invades Ukraine — Energy & Defense Surge
actions: BUY iShares US Aerospace & Defense ETF (ITA)
ledger.notes: XLE +18.2%, ITA +12.4%, EWG short +23.4% (Germany most exposed to Russian gas). Avg return +21.3%. Strongest single trade in the backtest.

ledger.title: Omicron Variant Discovery — Travel Shutdown
ledger.notes: JETS short returned +9.2% in 6 days. MRNA returned +12.1% initially then gave back gains on severity data — exited MRNA early at +6%. Avg WIN.
